warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Project has specific goals and provides service to the community and its citizens

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The undertaking does not qualify as a community service initiative.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project either defines clear objectives OR offers a benefit to the community and its residents, but fails to do both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project clearly outlines its objectives AND delivers a service that benefits the community and its members.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project features objectives that are measurable and suggests subsequent actions or phases to advance the initial efforts.

criteria.name: Describe research into school and/or community needs

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: There is no indication that research into the needs of the school or community was conducted.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: While research was carried out, its methodology and findings are not presented with clarity.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The research was thoroughly performed and its details are presented in a clear and understandable manner.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The research process involved careful planning, successful execution, and a subsequent assessment of its effectiveness.

criteria.name: Describe planning, development, and implementation of project

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: There is no documentation or proof of the project's planning, creation, or execution.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: An explanation for either the project's planning, its development, or its implementation is absent.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The actions and stages involved in the project's planning, development, and execution are explicitly detailed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The actions and stages for planning, developing, and implementing the project are described, along with the justification for choosing those particular activities.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No proof of the project receiving public attention is provided.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The report mentions publicity, but no supporting evidence of this publicity is available.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project gained recognition within the school and/or the broader community.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project achieved recognition through multiple avenues within the school and/or community.

criteria.name: Report benefits to and degree of impact on the school and/or community

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The influence or advantages for the school and/or community are not discussed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project was completed and fulfilled a specific function.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project produced concrete outcomes that positively affected the school and/or community.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project significantly altered the school and/or community, suggesting its continuation is warranted due to its dynamic impact.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No documentation of the project's assessment is supplied.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project underwent an evaluation process.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project was evaluated, and that evaluation was subsequently reviewed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project was evaluated, and suggestions for modifications were provided.

criteria.name: Format and design a business report
criteria.description: This criterion assesses the layout and visual presentation of a business report, without requiring adherence to the Production Test Reference Guide.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The document lacks any discernible formatting.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The formatting is inconsistent, there is excessive unused space, and/or graphics or photos are included that are not relevant.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The report maintains a uniform formatting style throughout.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The report uses full-bleed elements, makes efficient use of space, incorporates relevant and clearly defined graphics, and exhibits consistent formatting.

criteria.name: Include correct grammar, punctuation, and spelling

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The document contains 5 or more errors in grammar, punctuation, or spelling.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The document contains 3-4 errors in grammar, punctuation, or spelling.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The document contains no more than 2 errors in grammar, punctuation, or spelling.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The document contains no more than 1 error in grammar, punctuation, or spelling.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines (Pre-Judged Asset)
criteria.description: This criterion evaluates whether the report's execution aligns with the specified guidelines for competitive events, including submission format, content restrictions, page limits, structural order, and essential components.

levels.label: Not Followed
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not adhere to the established guidelines.

levels.label: Followed
levels.descriptor: The execution conformed to the guidelines: The report was submitted as a PDF; links or QR codes were not utilized (except in citations); the report was 17 pages or less; the report followed the rating sheet's sequence and was formatted for 8 1/2" x 11" paper; a cover page with all criteria listed, a table of contents, and numbered pages were included; and only one community service project was highlighted.

criteria.name: Describes project development and strategies used to implement project

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No information regarding the project's creation or the methods employed for its execution is presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project's development is briefly explained, and very few strategies are employed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project's development is clearly detailed, and more than one strategy is outlined.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project's development is clearly detailed. The strategies are presented in chronological order and are thoroughly explained.

criteria.name: Describes research into school or community needs

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: There is no indication that research into the needs of the school or community was conducted.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: While research was carried out, its methodology and findings are not presented with clarity.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The research was thoroughly performed and its details are presented in a clear and understandable manner.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The research process involved careful planning, successful execution, and a subsequent assessment of its effectiveness.

criteria.name: Appropriate level of chapter member involvement in project

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The extent of chapter participation is not clarified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Involvement was restricted to 25% of the chapter members.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project was clearly a chapter initiative, with 50% of chapter members participating.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Over 75% of chapter members participated, and clear evidence of their impact is provided.

criteria.name: Degree of impact on the community and its citizens

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The influence or advantages for the school and/or community are not discussed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project was completed and fulfilled a specific function.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project produced concrete outcomes that positively affected the school and/or community.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project significantly altered the school and/or community, suggesting its continuation is warranted due to its dynamic impact.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No proof of the project receiving public attention is provided.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The report mentions publicity, but no supporting evidence of this publicity is available.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project gained promotion or recognition within the school and/or the broader community.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project achieved promotion or recognition through multiple avenues within the school and/or community.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No documentation of the project's assessment is supplied.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project underwent an evaluation process.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project was evaluated, and that evaluation was subsequently reviewed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The project was evaluated, and the team has developed recommendations for modifications should the project be repeated.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready to present.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a coherent structure.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order, and all statements were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) did not exhibit any of the specified abilities.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) exhibited 1-2 of the specified abilities (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection).

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) exhibited 3 of the specified abilities (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection).

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) exhibited all specified abilities, thereby enhancing the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) do not answer questions, or their responses are entirely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) provide incomplete or unclear answers, indicating a limited grasp of the topic.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) respond accurately and clearly to most questions, demonstrating sufficient understanding.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presenter(s) respond confidently with clear, accurate, and insightful answers that elevate the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines (Presentation)
criteria.description: This criterion assesses whether the presentation's execution aligns with the specified guidelines for competitive events, including technology use, topic alignment, professional conduct, material handling, and content restrictions.

levels.label: Not Followed
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not adhere to the established guidelines.

levels.label: Followed
levels.descriptor: The execution conformed to the guidelines: Only permissible technology devices were used (sizing specifications were met; a maximum of two, with only one facing judges at a time); the presentation aligned with the assigned topic; professional boundaries were maintained during set-up (no interaction with judges); no materials were left behind after the presentation; links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges); audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round); and the use of food or live animals was avoided.
